conversation_starters.title: New wolf pack confirmed in Colorado: Piney Ridge Pack
conversation_starters.summary: New confirmed wolf pack — CO wolf reintroduction is a live statewide talking point. You could open with: 'Did you see they confirmed a new wolf pack — the Piney Ridge Pack?'
conversation_starters.description: Colorado Parks and Wildfire confirms four successful wolf groups in the state.

conversation_starters.title: Denver Summit FC releases updated stadium renderings
conversation_starters.summary: Denver Summit FC (NWSL) new stadium renderings — major local development project, metro-prominent. You could open with: 'Did you see the updated renderings for the Summit FC stadium at Santa Fe Yards?'
conversation_starters.description: Denver Summit FC unveils updated plans for its new stadium at Santa Fe Yards, featuring larger social spaces for fans, following community feedback.

conversation_starters.title: Denver sees explosion of parking court cases after dispute office cuts
conversation_starters.summary: Surge in Denver parking-court cases after office cuts — affects local drivers' daily hassle, work-safe. You could open with: 'Have you gotten caught up in the Denver parking-court backlog?'
conversation_starters.description: Some drivers schedule court hearings only to have them cancelled in the days and weeks before because right of way agents can't appear in court.

you_should_know.title: Aurora asked everyone to cut back water usage. The city says its largest user has refused
you_should_know.summary: City water-cutback request and largest user refusing — water-supply condition affecting Aurora residents. Institutional dispute over conservation. You should walk in aware of the local water situation.
you_should_know.description: The Aurora City Council met with water officials Monday to discuss what it can do about Niagara Bottling and its usage.

you_should_know.title: Denver Mayor talks changes to childcare licensing and affordable housing in State of the City address
you_should_know.summary: Denver mayor State of the City — affordable housing and childcare licensing plans, metro-wide policy context. You should walk in aware.
you_should_know.description: Mayor Mike Johnston introduced plans for a citywide listening tour and thousands of affordable housing units in his 2026 State of the City speech.
